loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

type_pay_money.text: ประเภทการจ่าย

loan_contract_no.text: ตั้งเเต่เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.branch_id ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.return_fund_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code ,pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no, 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as bank_acc_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code
,case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' then 'สามัญ' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' then 'พิเศษ' else '' end as loan_group_type_name
,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.approver_code ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_desc ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as requestment_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract) as begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status ,( select sum( amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as dep_amt
,( select sum( insure_pay ) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as ins_amt ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type
WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approver_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no not in (select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '1') /*WHERE*/
